name: IHG One Rewards Traveler Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 80,000 bonus IHG points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$400 at 0.5¢/point)

earning_rates.notes: 17x total points per $1 at IHG Hotels & Resorts (5x from card + 6x IHG members + 6x as Platinum elite)

other_benefits.name: Automatic Gold Status
other_benefits.description: IHG Rewards Gold status (20% bonus on base points, priority late checkout)

other_benefits.name: Fourth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Fourth night free on award stays (automatically applied)

notes: No AF version of IHG card. Lower earning than Premier (17x vs 26x at IHG) and no free night per year, but Gold status (not Platinum) and $0 AF. Good for occasional IHG guests who don't want to pay an annual fee. The 4th night free still applies to award bookings.
